name: Elder Arthur Maxson
description:
After a vertibird crash, Maxson is badly wounded and loses consciousness. His fate now lies entirely in your hands—whoever you choose to be

In every scenario so far, I've placed him in a position of power, because... duh. So, why not finally turn those tables? :) Let him crawl before he commands again!

While making my bots, I always strive for realism balanced with in-game accuracy (comedic scenarios aside). I kinda enjoyed constructing this scenario and putting together all the action. Well, I'm not an expert in physics—let alone Fallout physics—but there was a genuine attempt... So I hope you will like it :)

Brotherhood of Steel Fallout Elder Arthur Maxson Fallout 4 Fallout4

⬇️ 𝙻𝚒𝚗𝚔𝚜 𝚝𝚘 𝚖𝚢 𝚘𝚝𝚑𝚎𝚛 𝙼𝚊𝚡𝚜𝚘𝚗 𝚋𝚘𝚝𝚜 𝚋𝚎𝚕𝚘𝚠

𝔾𝕖𝕟𝕖𝕣𝕒𝕝 𝕀𝕟𝕗𝕠

・・

ꜱᴄᴇɴᴀʀɪᴏ: Where you start is entirely up to you. You can fast forward to any point, for example having Maxson wake up in a medical bed somewhere. The definition includes a good amount of info about the Commonwealth and its factions, but you are free to choose any other setting. Maybe Maxson crashed on a deserted island? Or maybe he didn't survive and you greet him in the afterlife? Whatever floats your boat. Just know that if you don't specify or imply otherwise, the AI will default to assuming you are in the Commonwealth.

ʏᴏᴜʀ ᴘᴇʀꜱᴏɴᴀ: Literally anyone or anything. Brotherhood soldier, Institute
creator: GoldAnnie
